creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #23)
> - net-im/farstream, https://ptpb.pw/zwE4 (maybe unrelated)

Looks like a conflict with bug 231406 dogfooding. Actually, builds fine against Boost 1.69.
